_note: Label Sprint round for sarcomere — generated sarcomere_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
alt: Sarcomere structure showing thick and thin filaments
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the sarcomere.

hotspots.label: Z-line
hotspots.detail: Boundary of a sarcomere, anchoring the thin filaments.

hotspots.label: Z-line
hotspots.detail: Boundary of a sarcomere, anchoring the thin filaments.

hotspots.label: Thin filament (actin)
hotspots.detail: Thinner protein strand anchored at the Z-line; slides during contraction.

hotspots.label: Thick filament (myosin)
hotspots.detail: Thicker protein filament with projecting heads that pull on actin.

hotspots.label: Myosin head
hotspots.detail: The globular cross-bridge that binds actin and generates the power stroke.

hotspots.label: M-line
hotspots.detail: The midline of the sarcomere, anchoring the thick filaments.
